news.title: Global market: Chinese stocks sink to one-month lows as Middle East tensions trigger a broad selloff
news.description: Chinese stocks experienced a significant downturn on Monday, reaching monthly lows. Escalating Middle East geopolitical tensions dampened investor sentiment and triggered widespread profit-taking. High-growth sectors like defence and technology saw sharp declines, while defensive stocks gained.
